mapper.insert:
insert into order_detail(order_id, goods_id, goods_type, num, couponId, pay_money) values
(#{orderDetail.orderId},#{orderDetail.goodsId},#{orderDetail.goodsType},#{orderDetail.num},#{orderDetail.couponId},#{orderDetail.finishPrice})

insert into order_detail_config(detail_id, dish_id, value_id) values
(#{config.detailId},#{config.dishId},#{config.valueId})

insert into order_combo_detail(order_detail_id, dish_id, num) values
(#{comboDetail.detailId},#{comboDetail.dishId},#{comboDetail.num})
mapper.update:
update `order` set state = 1,pickup_num = null,expiration_time = null where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select odc.detail_id, odc.value_id, cv.name from order_detail_config odc join config_value cv on odc.value_id = cv.id where odc.detail_id in
#{detailId}

select ocd.id, ocd.order_detail_id as detailId,ocd.dish_id , d.name as dishName, ocd.num,ocd.num from order_combo_detail ocd join dish d on ocd.dish_id = d.id where ocd.order_detail_id in
#{detailId}

select ocdc.order_combo_detail_id as comboDetailId, ocdc.value_id, cv.name from order_combo_dish_config ocdc join config_value cv on ocdc.value_id = cv.id where ocdc.order_combo_detail_id in
#{detailId}

select od.id as detailId, od.order_id, od.goods_type,od.goods_id,od.num,od.couponId,od.pay_money, case od.goods_type when 0 then d.name when 1 then c.name end as goodsName, case od.goods_type when 0 then d.cover when 1 then c.cover end as cover from order_detail od left join dish d on od.goods_type = 0 and od.goods_id = d.id left join combo c on od.goods_type = 1 and od.goods_id = c.id where od.order_id in
#{orderId}

select od.id, od.goods_type,od.goods_id,od.num,od.couponId,od.pay_money from order_detail od where od.order_id in
#{orderId}
